title: GreenGateway RBAC Policy
description: Draft 2020-12 JSON Schema for the GreenGateway RBAC policy document. Unknown top-level keys are permitted for forward compatibility and will produce a startup warning.

routes.description: Ordered route-to-permission rules. Rules are evaluated in array order, and the first matching rule wins.

methods.description: HTTP methods this rule matches. Empty or ["*"] means any method.

path_prefix.description: Path prefix matched with starts_with, such as /admin or /v1/.

permission.description: Permission required to access a matching route.

enforcement_mode.description: Optional rule-level override for whether deny decisions block or emit authz.would_deny and forward.
